element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Communication with cetaceans, generating area maps
Manages drowning mechanic; find air vents to restore
Restored by eating fish or singing to clams
Blocking paths require key-glyphs; some provide information or healing
Long-range weapon capability for song ability
Travel 55 million years to past; retrieve orbs from ancient Asterite
Temporarily disorients sharks, freezes minor enemies
Slow automatic health recovery granted by Asterite
Ability to survive without air meter constraint

typical_relief_triggers: Surfacing for air at designated vents
Singing to clams to restore health
Finding safe zones with collectible fish
Meeting friendly NPCs (dolphins, Big Blue) who provide narrative guidance
typical_tension_triggers: Entering unfamiliar territory after narrative progression
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Exploration-driven with periodic combat encounters; tension builds through air management constraints combined with enemy opposition; relief obtained through safe zones and NPC interaction

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Glyphs with informational content scattered throughout environment; some provide health/invulnerability bonuses
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Echolocation song reveals map of area when held; suggests navigation paths and hidden structures

difficulty_curve.early_game: Learning air management and basic ramming combat in home bay and adjacent ocean areas; gentle enemy encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Navigation to Arctic and deep-sea cavern; introduction of glyph-based puzzle solving; moderate enemy variety increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Time travel sequences with ancient threats; Atlantis exploration with complex glyph navigation; encounter with upgraded combat capabilities required for Vortex forces
notable_spikes: First time travel (battle with past Asterite)
Vortex spacecraft navigation with alien enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: Game opens in protected bay where waterspout event occurs; immediately shifts to open ocean exploration requiring air management
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Home Bay and subsequent ocean journey

notable_level_patterns.description: Key narrative points marked by encounters with wise creatures (dolphins, Big Blue, Asterite) who provide quest direction and lore exposition
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Arctic Big Blue encounter; deep-sea Asterite cavern

notable_level_patterns.description: Atlantis library contains Glyphs with informational content; player must decode ancient knowledge to progress plot
Same location (Asterite cavern) encountered twice across different time periods (past and present); combat required in past version
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Ancient Asterite realm (55 million years ago)

notable_level_patterns.description: Extended spacecraft navigation culminating in boss confrontation; requires mastery of all learned mechanics (combat, song upgrades, navigation)
